name: Problem Solving
description: The cognitive capability to structure complex programming logic, trace defects logically, and devise efficient algorithmic solutions to business problems.

name: Team Collaboration
description: Collaborative agility to work in cross-functional agile teams, communicate technical concepts clearly, and review team output supportively.

name: System Design & Decomposition
description: Ability to design distributed architectures, establish separation of concerns, and analyze system performance constraints.
